recommendations.title: The Butterfly's Dream
recommendations.overview: In a small Turkish town, two young tuberculous poets try to survive while publishing their poems. As they both fall in love, their life would never be the same.

recommendations.title: Magic Carpet Ride
recommendations.overview: A struggling, suicidal young comedian meets a car thief who is willing to teach him a few things about his profession.

recommendations.title: Vizontele
recommendations.overview: The story takes place in the small town of Hakkari in Turkey at the beginning of the '70s. The time has come to bring technology to that small town. The first Television (called Visiontele by the citizens) arrives and the chaos begins.

recommendations.title: Vizontele Tuuba
recommendations.overview: Guner Sernikli is a government official who, with his wife and their wheelchair bound daughter, has been assigned as the head librarian to this isolated province, virtually an exile since there is no library in the village. The family is warmly welco

recommendations.title: The Shadow's Edge
recommendations.overview: Macau Police brings the tracking expert police officer out of retirement to help catch a dangerous group of professional thieves.

recommendations.title: Don't Be a Menace to South Central While Drinking Your Juice in the Hood
recommendations.overview: When Ashtray moves to South Central L.A. to live with his father (who appears to be the same age he is) and grandmother (who likes to talk tough and smoke reefer), he falls in with his gang-banging cousin Loc Dog, who along with the requisite pistols

recommendations.title: Straight from the Barrio
recommendations.overview: A young drug dealer falls in love while facing disruption among the men in his gang, and being offered a career as a Reggaetón singer.

recommendations.title: Boys Don't Cry
recommendations.overview: A young aspiring violinist unwittingly becomes involved with a criminal gang.

recommendations.title: Killing Cabos
recommendations.overview: Two young men get involved with some criminals while trying to free the tycoon they kidnapped.

recommendations.title: Law of Tehran
